Engrams
Docs GitHub

AI context memory that
actually works

Structured Memory

Save architectural decisions (ADRs), system patterns, task progress, and product context.

FTS5 Search

Blazing fast local full-text search in SQLite lets your AI retrieve relevant details instantly.

Git-Sync Friendly

Export the database to clean markdown files for version control, and import them back on checkout.

Zero Overhead

Written in Rust with no background daemons, servers, memory footprint, or external APIs.

Knowledge Graph

Link decisions to patterns, progress to decisions, and features to custom configuration data.

Agent-Native

Simple JSON inputs/outputs designed for direct terminal tool execution by AI coding assistants.

Get started →
terminal 
$ engrams --help
Usage: engrams [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

Commands:
  init             Initialize the database schema
  migrate          Migrate the database schema to the latest version
  product-context  Manage the product context document
  active-context   Manage the active context document
  history          View history of context documents
  decision         Log and search architectural decisions
  progress         Track task execution and progress
  pattern          Log recurring system patterns and conventions
  custom           Store arbitrary configuration or key-value data
  link             Create knowledge-graph relations between items
  activity         Get a recent summary of all modifications
  batch            Perform multiple operations in a single transaction
  export           Dump database to Markdown files for git sync
  import           Import Markdown files back into the database

$ engrams decision log \
  --summary "Use PostgreSQL for primary database" \
  --rationale "Need ACID guarantees and complex queries" \
  --tags "db,arch"
Decision logged as ID 1.

$ engrams decision search "caching"
# Search results retrieved instantly via FTS5 index...
Open Source · v0.2.0

Works with your favourite AI tools
